summary: Expanded novel power-user workflow layer: monitors, briefs, account snapshots, URL mentions, performance tracking, and timeline export.
reason: The PRD's remaining X power-user scenarios need durable local workflow objects and agent-friendly commands on top of generated endpoint primitives: watermarked monitoring, source-backed packaging, account context, URL mention tracking, post metric snapshots, and portable timeline exports.
validated_outcome: Focused tests cover monitor definitions/dedupe, preview duplicate checks, URL query normalization, RFC3339 since parsing, account profile normalization, brief construction, performance grouping, timeline export formatting and LIKE escaping, plus go test ./..., go build, and strict SKILL.md verification.
